description: The night auditor needs to run the end-of-day process to close the day's business and prepare for the next.

nodes.task_description: Verify that all departments (e.g., F&B, gift shop) have closed their shifts and submitted their daily totals.

expected_outcome.expected: The auditor confirms all departmental reports are in.

nodes.task_description: Post all remaining room and tax charges to guest folios.

expected_outcome.expected: All in-house guests have their daily charges posted.

nodes.task_description: Run the main night audit sequence in the PMS, which closes the current business day and generates summary reports.

expected_outcome.expected: The audit process completes successfully, and the system date rolls over.
